input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
fname = 'articles/2026/02/27/articles.jsonl'
kws = ['iran strike', 'iran attack', 'israel strike', 'tehran', 'isfahan', 'iranian missile', 'israel bomb', 'us strike iran', 'hezbollah', 'lebanon strike', 'beirut', 'iran retaliation', 'strait of hormuz', 'gulf attack', 'iran nuclear']
with open(fname) as f:
    for line in f:
        art = json.loads(line)
        title = (art.get('title','') or '').lower()
        for kw in kws:
            if kw in title:
                print(f'[{kw}] {(art.get(\"title\",\"\") or \"\")[:140]}')
                break
" 2>/dev/null | head -30
